channel.title: Staging Environment on Jens Rantil
channel.description: Recent content in Staging Environment on Jens Rantil

item.title: On staging environments
item.description: The ultimate quality assurance is when customers get their hands on your software and actually try it. That’s when you know if your software does what it’s supposed to do or not. This happens in production. Every technical decision has a tradeoff, but certain things are rarely challenged in our industry. Having a staging environment[1], and having every change go through the staging environment, are two of those things.
